description: claude-team-mem: inject team-shared memory at session start

hooks.command:
export PATH="$($SHELL -lc 'echo $PATH' 2>/dev/null):$PATH"; _C="${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}"; _E="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; _P=$({ [ -n "$_E" ] && printf '%s
' "$_E"; ls -dt "$_C/plugins/cache/eng-dot-md/claude-team-mem"/[0-9]*/ 2>/dev/null; printf '%s
' "$_C/plugins/marketplaces/eng-dot-md/plugin"; } | while IFS= read -r _R; do _R="${_R%/}"; [ -d "$_R/plugin/scripts" ] && _Q="$_R/plugin" || _Q="$_R"; [ -f "$_Q/scripts/load.mjs" ] && { printf '%s
' "$_Q"; break; }; done); [ -n "$_P" ] || exit 0; command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1 && { _W=$(cygpath -w "$_P" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$_W" ] && _P="$_W"; }; node "$_P/scripts/load.mjs" 2>/dev/null || true
